metadata.description: AI development tools - scaffolding, sidecar containers, and more

plugins.name: ai-scaffold
plugins.description: Project scaffolding with standard dev configs (biome, ruff, vitest, pytest, cursor rules, claude hooks)

plugins.name: skill-peekaboo
plugins.description: Visual UI testing for macOS apps using Peekaboo CLI - alternative to Playwright for native macOS testing

plugins.name: quorum-counsel
plugins.description: Multi-model review and analysis — counsel-reviewer, codex-solver, gemini-solver, and oracle-solver background agents with CLI permission hooks

plugins.name: shravan-dev-workflow
plugins.description: Development workflow skills for goal orchestration, spec design swarms, discuss-with-me thinking clarification, docs maintenance, adversarial council review, security scan routing, bounded subagent review lanes, plan handoff/review/execution, implementation handoff, debugging, skill audits, TUI presentation, and PM Linear work
